name: fact-check
tagline: Verifies JS documentation accuracy against code execution, MDN, and the ECMAScript spec before publishing.
verdict: Thorough, well-structured verification skill with strong failure-path and output-contract coverage; no meaningful security issues. Minor gaps: no scope exclusions, oversized SKILL.md with inline catalogs/templates, an unpinned optional install, and no versioning signal.

highlights.summary: 'npm install -g broken-link-checker' is a well-known package installed unpinned/global.
Description states what it verifies but has no explicit 'use when' trigger phrasing.
No 'NOT for' or out-of-scope guidance anywhere in the skill.
